com.shanbay.lib.texas.image

类 ImageLoader

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.shanbay.lib.texas.image.ImageLoader

  • @Hidden
public class ImageLoader
extends java.lang.Object
    图片加载器

    • 嵌套类概要

      嵌套类 
      限定符和类型 类和说明
      static interface  ImageLoader.CacheStrategy 
      static interface  ImageLoader.ImageFormat 
      class  ImageLoader.Request
      Image Request

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static int CACHE_STRATEGY_ALL
      DiskCacheStrategy.ALL
      static int CACHE_STRATEGY_AUTOMATIC
      DiskCacheStrategy.AUTOMATIC
      static int CACHE_STRATEGY_DATA
      DiskCacheStrategy.DATA
      static int CACHE_STRATEGY_NONE
      DiskCacheStrategy.NONE
      static int CACHE_STRATEGY_RESOURCE
      DiskCacheStrategy.RESOURCE
      static int FORMAT_ARGB_8888
      should return Bitmap.Config#ARGB_8888 for Bitmap.getConfig() when possible.
      static int FORMAT_RGB_565
      Bitmaps decoded from image formats that support and/or use alpha (some types of PNGs, GIFs etc) should return Bitmap.Config#ARGB_8888 for Bitmap.getConfig().

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 字段详细资料

      • FORMAT_ARGB_8888

        public static final int FORMAT_ARGB_8888
        should return Bitmap.Config#ARGB_8888 for Bitmap.getConfig() when possible.

        GIF images decoded by BitmapFactory currently use an internal hidden format that is returned as null from Bitmap.getConfig(). Since we cannot force BitmapFactory to always return our desired config, this setting is a preference, not a promise.

        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

      • FORMAT_RGB_565

        public static final int FORMAT_RGB_565
        Bitmaps decoded from image formats that support and/or use alpha (some types of PNGs, GIFs etc) should return Bitmap.Config#ARGB_8888 for Bitmap.getConfig(). Bitmaps decoded from formats that don't support or use alpha should return Bitmap.Config#RGB_565 for Bitmap.getConfig().
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

      • CACHE_STRATEGY_NONE

        public static final int CACHE_STRATEGY_NONE
        DiskCacheStrategy.NONE
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

        public static final int CACHE_STRATEGY_DATA
        DiskCacheStrategy.DATA
        另请参阅:

        常量字段值

        DiskCacheStrategy.AUTOMATIC
        另请参阅:
        常量字段值

      • CACHE_STRATEGY_ALL

        public static final int CACHE_STRATEGY_ALL
